vllm.title: [CI/Build] build on empty device for better dev experience
vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables build of a platform-agnostic wheel which is installable also on macos. The idea is to improve the dev-experience for creating projects that import and use vLLM.
Important: This wheel does not enable running of vllm on mac, but does allow to import it.
The PR doesn't entirely fix issu

vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Following #4773 - Add the option to build vLLM with VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=empty to the docs.

vllm.title: [misc] add commit id in collect env
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: add commit id in collect env, to better identify the code used by users.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Minor refactoring for vLLM assets
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously we have been using s3://air-example-data-2/vllm_opensource_llava/ for storing image assets. This bucket is not managed by the vLLM group, and this PR migrate image assets to the new bucket that we manage so that we can reuse for general asset storage purposes as well.
This PR also refacto
